name: Peanut Butter Bread
method: Heat the oven degrees Fahrenheit (180 degrees Celsius) (180
degrees Celsius). (180 degrees Fahrenheit) LineLine an 8 1/2" x
4 1/2" loaf pan with parchment paper and coat with cooking
spray.
Whisk eggs in a stand mixer or with a hand mixer until light and
foamy, about 3 minutes. Continue to beat, gradually pouring in
the sugar and salt until the eggs are frothy and ribbony, about 4
to 5 minutes longer.
Meanwhile, whisk together milk, vinegar, and peanut butter in a
medium mixing bowl until reasonably smooth. In a mixing
bowl, combine the baking powder, baking soda, and flour.
Slowly add half of the flour combination and half of the milk
mixture to the egg mixture, stirring for 5 to 10 seconds between
additions. Fold the batter together gently until it is smooth, then
pour into the prepared pan.
Baked for 10 min, or until the top is golden brown and the edges
are pulling away from the pan.
Allow cooling in the pan for 5 minutes before transferring to a
cooling rack. Allow the bread to cool fully before slicing for
clean slices.
